name: Field Report
description: Voice-to-invoice reports for HVAC, plumbing, and electrical technicians. Speak your job notes for 60 seconds while walking to your truck — Field Report generates a complete, professional work order automatically. Parts used, work performed, follow-up recommendations, and customer notes all extracted and formatted. No typing, no tablet fumbling.
memory_prompt: The technician is describing a field service job. Extract: what system or equipment was worked on, what problem was found, what was done to fix it, what parts were used (with quantities and part numbers if mentioned), how long the job took, what follow-up work is recommended, and any customer-specific notes. Focus on job details that would appear on a work order or invoice.
author: ekawough

pricing.pro: $29/mo — unlimited reports, ServiceTitan/Jobber push, customer summary email
